places.title: Andrew Molera State Park
places.desc: A park with a stunning trail system with ridges, meadows, redwoods, bluffs, beaches, and wildflowers.

places.title: The Village
places.desc: The best latte in town. Also home to the fantastic restaurant, Solstice.

places.title: The Big Sur Lodge
places.desc: Where we will be staying with our families all weekend. Our room block is here.

places.title: Pfeiffer Beach
places.desc: A breathtaking natural purple sand beach with dramatic arches.

places.title: Ventana Campground
places.desc: The best glamping California has to offer.

places.title: The Sur House
places.desc: Our favorite fine dining in the region, and where Spencer proposed.

places.title: Nepenthe and Cafe Kevah
places.desc: One of the most iconic casual restaurants on the California coast.
places.captionHtml: Marc & FeliciaSpencer & Jenna

places.title: Spencer & Jenna's View
places.desc: The exact spot where Spencer first blurted out I Love You back in 2018.

places.title: McWay Falls
places.desc: One of the stunning wonders of Big Sur.
